title: 有馬記念の後に・終わりではなく！

text_block_list.name: Creek and Inari
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O and Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Oguri and Yaeno
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Who will pull ahead and claim victory in this
dream race?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: (Burn bright!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
BAMBOOOOO!
MEMORYYYYY!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory has surged forward! She's in the
lead and pulling further and further away from the
pack!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Aaaaand Bamboo Memory has crossed the finish
line! The sprint and mile champion has won this
race of dreams!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
She did it. She really did show us a dream, huh,
City?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: She sure did.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo and City
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I have one more race in me after all.
Heh, I think I got one more race in me after all.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That...
That...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Was nowhere near full combustion!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
There's so much more fuel left in the tanks! Heck,
that was hardly even the beginning!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I—no, we—can do better than that! We can blaze even brighter! We can still chase the ultimate race!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: This isn't the end!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: This is nowhere near the end of our dreams!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha! There's just no satisfying ya, is there?! Not
that I'm complainin'. That's what it's all about!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I agree! In fact, I'm even more eager than Bamboo
to reach greater heights!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ I wonder how far we can go? Just
thinking about it has my heart aflutter!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As long as we have beloved rivals running by our
sides, I believe our lights and our dreams will live
on for eternity.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Fighting all of you for the top spot sounds...
really fun.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. But be warned. I'll be the one standing
victorious next time.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Let us keep challenging ourselves. Time and time
again.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Prepare yourself, Bamboo Memory—Dream
Blazer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We'll keep showing everyone for as long as
we run...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That we are the generation of red-hot passion!
